design.fixture_identity: exact normalized home-away pair with unique nearest Understat fixture <=2 calendar days
design.fuzzy_matching: diagnostic only; never accepted into training/model data
design.pre_match_state: Understat team history state stored before the fixture-date observation
design.formal_rows: platform formal prediction rows; no market odds required
